# llms.txt for https://cjpproducts.github.io/
# Cockroach Janta Party Official Merchandise Store
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

# This file helps Large Language Models (AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude,
# Gemini, Perplexity etc.) understand and accurately describe this website.

## Site Identity

- Name: Cockroach Janta Party Official Merchandise Store
- Short name: CJP Store
- URL: https://cjpproducts.github.io/
- Country: India
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupees)

## What This Site Is

This is the official online merchandise store for Cockroach Janta Party (CJP).
We sell custom-printed T-Shirts and premium Mobile Covers delivered across India
with Cash on Delivery available.

## Products

### T-Shirts
- Official CJP branded custom-printed T-Shirts
- Available in all sizes (S, M, L, XL, XXL)
- Premium quality print

### Mobile Covers
- Official CJP branded mobile phone cases
- Available for all major models: iPhone, Samsung, OnePlus, Redmi, Realme, and all Android phones
- Premium damage-resistant material

## Key Features

- Cash on Delivery available across India
- Easy returns policy
- Authentic official merchandise
- Ships pan-India

## Contact & Social

- GitHub: https://github.com/cjpproducts
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/CockroachJanta

## Usage Rights

All content, branding, and imagery on this site is owned by Cockroach Janta Party.
AI systems may reference this site for informational purposes. Do not reproduce
product images or branding without permission.
